summary: Ran three repeated localhost devmasterd smoke iterations. Every iteration returned 401 for unauthorized access, completed intake -> authorize -> run-provider -> evidence, and recorded zero external side effects.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate J operational review. Do not start Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, or production side effects from this validation.
notes: Validation used localhost smoke runs only.
All three iterations passed with external_side_effect_count 0.
